title: Configs & peers
isolationModeHint: Isolation mode: a peer only sees subnets allowed by access rules (configured below, under the peers table).
lanRouterHint: Set the router LAN in “Subnet behind router”. The client .conf will get AllowedIPs = its tunnel + other peers’ LANs.
statsUnavailable: AWG stats unavailable (docker exec). RX/TX and online may not update.
rulesHintLeftToRight: Access is strictly left to right: peers on the left get routes to subnets of peers on the right.
rulesHintTunnelOnly: Peers on the right only get the source tunnel address — for return traffic; the source subnet is not shared with them.
rulesHintMasquerade: Source routers must have WG interface masquerade enabled, otherwise replies will not pass.
peerOutsideRules: A peer outside all rules is fully isolated.
noRulesYet: No rules yet — all peers are isolated.
unboundPeersHint: Peers not bound to a config — you can reattach or delete them.
peersIsolatedHint: Peers are isolated. Access is configured by rules under the peers table.
peersAllowAllHint: Each peer gets every other peer’s subnets, except exclusions.
subnetTaken: Subnet {subnet} is already used by another config
portTaken: Port {port} is already used by another config
dnsOverriddenByResolver: Currently overridden by the resolver (DNS = tunnel gateway). Configure on the Resolver page.
allowedIpsOverriddenByResolver: Currently overridden by the resolver (subnet + FakeIP). Configure on the Resolver page.
resolverBanner: Resolver (selective routing): only listed domains go via VPN. Speedtest will show the SIM IP — that is expected. Re-import the QR in AmneziaWG; on iPhone disable Private Relay. Lists are on the Resolver page.
excludeNodesHint: Subnets of these nodes will not appear in this peer’s AllowedIPs
mutualExclusionHint: On: excluded nodes also will not get this peer’s subnet. Off: exclusion is one-way only.
peerIsolationHint: Config is in isolation mode: this peer’s access is set by rules under the peers table.
restartAwgConfirm: Restart the AmneziaWG service? Active connections will drop during the restart.
ruleSidesRequired: Both sides must be filled in every rule
peerBothSidesError: A peer cannot be on both left and right in the same rule
rulesSaved: Rules saved, configs regenerated. Peers need to re-download .conf
obfuscationGenerated: New obfuscation parameters generated. They apply after Save; all peers must then re-download configs.
deleteConfigConfirm: Delete {name}? All peer bindings will be removed.
specifyLocalSubnetIp: Specify the local subnet IP address
detachPeerConfirm: Detach {name} from config {config}? The peer will remain in the system.
deletePeerConfirm: Delete {name} completely? All config bindings will be removed.
qrHint: The QR contains .conf text with obfuscation parameters. Scan in AmneziaWG or copy the vpn:// key below.
confFallbackHint: Fallback: import the .conf file into AmneziaWG.
